Hugh III, Anselme and Hugh IV, Comtes de Saint Pol, in the Foundation for Medieval Genealogy
~https://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/NORTHERN%20FRANCE.htm#HuguesIVSaintPoldied1205
With de Vere and Calder crests.

Coat of arms of Clan Cairns, and Cairns Cairns of That Ilk. Calder was also named: Of That Ilk; see Calder of That Ilk. French merlette a mythical duck with no legs and beak indicate noble French origin.

zh.Constantinople,34126,Fatih,Istanbul,TURQ: 土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾
zh.Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise,62767,Pas-de-Cala: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol於1151年6月24日出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾時，他的父親Anselme I de SAINT-POL25歲，母親Eustachie de Blois17歲。他於1178年與Yolande de Hainaut結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他於1204年登記服兵役。他去世於1205年4月10日在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol于1151年6月24日出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾时，他的父亲Anselme I de SAINT-POL25岁，母亲Eustachie de Blois17岁。他于1178年与Yolande de Hainaut结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他于1204年登记服兵役。他去世于1205年4月10日在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol was born on 24 June 1151, in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Anselme I de SAINT-POL, was 25 and his mother, Eustachie de Blois, was 17. He married Yolande de Hainaut in 1178. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1204. He died on 10 April 1205, in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkiye, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol est né le 24 juin 1151, à Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Anselme I de SAINT-POL, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Eustachie de Blois, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Yolande de Hainaut en 1178. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1204. Il est décédé le 10 avril 1205, à Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquie, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol am 24. Juni 1151 in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Anselme I de SAINT-POL 25 und seine Mutter Eustachie de Blois 17. Er hat 1178 Yolande de Hainaut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1204 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 10. April 1205 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkei.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol è nato il il 24 giugno 1151 nel Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Anselme I de SAINT-POL, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Eustachie de Blois, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Yolande de Hainaut nel 1178. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1204. Morì il 10 aprile 1205, nel Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turchia, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.Constantinople,34126,Fatih,Istanbul,TURQ: トルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブル
ja.Scotland, United Kingdom: イギリススコットランド
ja.Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise,62767,Pas-de-Cala: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-プオル-スル-テルノイゼ
ja.lifeSummary: Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Polが1151年6月24日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-プオル-スル-テルノイゼで生まれた時，父Anselme I de SAINT-POLは25歳，母Eustachie de Bloisは17歳であった。1178年にYolande de Hainautと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1204年に兵役登録をした。彼は1205年4月10日にトルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブルで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol(이)가 1151년 6월 24일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-포-수-터노이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anselme I de SAINT-POL(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Eustachie de Blois(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1178년 Yolande de Hainaut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1204년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1205년 4월 10일 튀르키예 이스탠불 팻이h 이스탠불에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.24 JUN 1151–10 APR 1205: 1151 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 24–1205 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 10

pt.24 JUN 1151–10 APR 1205: 24 de junho de 1151–10 de abril de 1205
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol nasceu em 24 de junho de 1151, em Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Anselme I de SAINT-POL, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Eustachie de Blois, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Yolande de Hainaut em 1178. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1204. Ele faleceu em 10 de abril de 1205, em Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquia, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol родился 24 июня 1151 г. в местности сеинт-пол-сур-тирноис, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Anselme I de SAINT-POL было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Eustachie de Blois, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Yolande de Hainaut в 1178 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. В 1204 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 10 апреля 1205 г. в местности истанбул, фатих, истанбул, Турция в возрасте 53 лет.

es.24 JUN 1151–10 APR 1205: 24 de junio de 1151–10 de abril de 1205
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol nació el 24 de junio de 1151, en Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Anselme I de SAINT-POL, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Eustachie de Blois, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Yolande de Hainaut en 1178. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1204. Murió el 10 de abril de 1205, en Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquía, a la edad de 53 años.
